claim.degenerate_removal: A = B = 0 is removed by noncontain_degeneracy
claim.frame_consequence: finite noncontained slope events inject into the finite locator set
claim.one_slope_rule: after degenerate removal, v8_ledger gives <=1 finite slope per locator

non_claims: does not count root tables for the F_17^32 M3/M4 window
does not classify locators as tangent, quotient, extension, or aperiodic
